Small Business
01

AI System Audit

$250 · credited toward any build
Standalone consulting. Start here. We review your operation: tools, workflows, where the hours actually go. You get written findings naming the places AI buys back the most time first. Build with us afterward and the fee credits in full.
02

AI Opportunity Map

$750 · the deep audit
Complete system review plus a written roadmap: priorities, tooling, projected return. Yours to execute with anyone, no build required. Credits toward a Curated deployment.
03

Agent Deployment

$500 – $1,500
Your bespoke agent, built and wired into the tools you already run, voice-to-execution included. Essential $500 · Business $1,000 · Curated $1,500. Every build opens with its own discovery.

from $299/mo

Proprietary capabilities

Not tools stitched together. Intelligence we engineer.

Each capability is a system we build and own, bridging AI to the real, physical work of your business.

01

Voice-to-Execution

The signature. Speak from anywhere; it transcribes, acts, and reports back in your brand's voice: your language, your tone. No app to open, no screen to touch. The AI in your pocket.
02

Spatial & Geospatial Intelligence

Measure a property from orbit and return a quote in seconds. Our agents bridge digital intelligence with real-world dimension.

Deployment sovereignty

One architecture. Every environment.

The same intelligence, scaled to fit, from a single owner running it from their pocket, to a regulated enterprise that needs everything sealed.

Managed Cloud · OpenClaw

High-velocity, zero-friction

Your agent on its own virtual computer in our managed cloud, built on OpenClaw. Live in days, scales the moment you need it. Ideal for immediate leverage without touching a server.

Sovereign Edge · Claude Code

Absolute data ownership

Built on Claude Code and installed directly on your own hardware, sealed by encrypted tunnels. Maximum privacy. Your data never leaves your possession. The system is yours.

Enterprise Private

Sealed for scale

Deployed inside your own Amazon or Google Cloud. Your data stays in your tenancy, never leaves it, and never trains a model. Compliance-grade privacy for regulated and sensitive operations.

The engagement

Every commission runs the same methodology.

I

Phase I: Architecture AuditDiagnostic & discovery.

We map your bottlenecks, data silos, and operational friction. Not a line of code is written until we know exactly where an agent creates asymmetric leverage. This is the $250 System Audit, credited in full when you build.

II

Phase II: Custom DeploymentCloud or sovereign edge.

We build your multi-agent architecture and wire it into the tools you already run (Stripe, calendars, CRM) in the environment that fits your security and scale.

III

Phase III: Managed IntelligenceOptimization & scale.

Deployment is the beginning. We monitor performance, refine the system, and expand its capabilities as your operation grows.

The architect

Agencies sell ads and retainers. We install permanent operational leverage.

Strange Advanced Marketing is led by Jereme Strange, an AI architect, not an ad buyer. Where a standard agency rents you attention, SAM designs the intelligence that runs underneath your business: multi-agent architecture, data-ingestion pipelines, and workflow automation, built bespoke and managed as you grow. You keep the leverage long after any campaign would have ended.

"Most software forgets you the second you close it. What we build remembers your business, and gets sharper every week it runs."

Jereme Strange · AI Architect

Built on a persistent memory architecture that compounds. Ours grew from 35,047 to 48,453 memory nodes and 81,825 to 105,369 connections across 6,619 recorded interactions, and it is still growing.
